reason: Successfully verified that the QA-20260401-025527-fznc agent can receive messages and provide correct responses
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Super Agent application homepage with sidebar containing three agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260401-025527-fznc" agent in the sidebar — Successfully selected the agent and navigated to the agent's chat page
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Confirmed agent status was "idle" at the top of the page
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Successfully typed the message in the input field and clicked the Send button, which transitioned the agent to "working" state
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded within 2 seconds with a complete message
Verified the response mentions "4" — Confirmed the agent's response displays "4" as the answer to the math question
